# The McDevitt Company

> A full-service retail real estate advisory firm providing strategic vision, data-driven insight, and global reach since 1997.

The McDevitt Company is a retail property advisory firm led by Managing Partner Wade McDevitt. The firm specializes in tenant representation, landlord representation, and mixed-use development consulting for premier retail and hospitality brands worldwide.

## Core Services

- **Tenant Representation**: Strategic site selection and lease negotiation for retailers, restaurants, and consumer brands expanding domestically and internationally.
- **Landlord Representation**: Leasing strategy, merchandising plans, and tenant curation for owners and developers of retail destinations.
- **Development Consulting**: Advisory services for mixed-use and retail-anchored developments, from concept through delivery.

## Data Science & Analytics

The firm operates an in-house data science practice covering market analytics, consumer behavior modeling, trade area analysis, competitive intelligence, location scoring, and scenario planning.

## Global Presence

Offices in Philadelphia, Greenwich, Nashville, West Palm Beach, Chicago, Los Angeles, London, and Amsterdam.

## Select Clients & Projects

The McDevitt Company has represented tenants and landlords across notable properties including Anthropologie at Rockefeller Center, Free People in London, Pastis Nashville, Terrain at Bethesda, and Simon Pearce, among others.

## Contact

- Website: https://mcdevittco.com
- Email: info@mcdevittco.com
